allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\aleja\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\grupo-cordillera-frontend-reyes\\frontend"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Exclude "node_modules",".git" | ForEach-Object { if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { $_.FullName.Replace\($PWD, ''\) } else { $_.FullName.Replace\($PWD, ''\) } } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\aleja\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\grupo-cordillera-frontend-reyes\\frontend"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Exclude "node_modules",".git" -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | % { $_.Replace\($PWD, ''\).TrimStart\('\\'\) } | Sort-Object)
